Title:
Pilot Deployment

Fields:
- Organization
- Intended use case
- Current workflow
- Expected outcome
- Contact

## 30-day dependency question (issue #2001)

After running Merge Guard as a required status check for 30 days, answer in
your own words:

> If Merge Guard were removed or disabled tomorrow, what becomes worse in
> your workflow?

## Submitting evidence

If you've installed Merge Guard, added it as a required status check, and
observed both a `VALID` and a `NULL` result, you can record that as evidence
toward issue #2001 by following
`governance/runtime/external-dependency-evidence/RUNBOOK.md` and adding a
record under `governance/runtime/external-dependency-evidence/`.
